# @microservices-sh/decision

Advise pillar: cited, human-owned decision briefs that close into action, plus an append-only decision log.

Exports (src/index.ts):
- draftDecisionBrief(input, { store, proposer, now, actor?, audit? }) -> { ok, status, data: { brief } }
- recordDecision(input, { store, now, dispatcher?, actor?, audit? }) -> { ok, status, data: { log, brief, actionRequest? } }
- listDecisions({ briefId }, { store }) -> { ok, status, data: { logs } }
- createMemoryDecisionStore(): in-memory DecisionStore (+ listEvents for tests)
- Ports: DecisionProposer, DecisionStore, ActionDispatcher, AuditSink

Events: decision.brief_drafted, decision.recorded. Consumes: research.brief_created.
Permissions: decision.read | decision.write | decision.admin | decision.extend | decision.observe.

Rules: cite-or-refuse (422 DECISION_UNCITED), human-owned drafts, append-only logs, accept closes into action.
